name: A Place to Call Your Own

logEntries.text: You've heard whispers of a new neighborhood being built outside Ados west gate. A realtor named Mira Penhollow is selling homes there - cottages, houses, manors, and even a four-room estate with a butler.
You bought the one-room Westgate Cottage from Mira. The sewing machine inside is yours to use anytime.
You bought the two-room Westgate House. Now you have a stove for cooking AND your sewing nook.
You bought the three-room Westgate Manor. The garden plot in back will grow whatever you plant. The forge in the craft hall lets you hammer your own weapons, shields, and rings.
You bought the four-room Westgate Estate. Reginald the butler can fetch goods from any market stall at a 20% discount. Best of every world.
You planted your first seed in the garden plot. Come back in 48 hours to harvest.
Your first harvest is in. The crops are ready to eat or cook.
